calendar.matters:
Petition To Reform Trust; To Modify Trust (I)On Consent Of All Beneficiaries; (Ii) On Changed Circumstances And/Or (Iii) On Consent Of Settlor And All
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz appeared by zoom for and with Caroline Guiral (petitioner) by zoom.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that he has nothing to add to his petition and that the petition is completely unopposed. The Petition to Reform Trust, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
